channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: CEE Commencement Celebration
item.description: Date: Friday, May 15, 2026 6:00 PM - 9:00 PM - Join us for dinner as we celebrate our graduating students. The event will be held at the Hilton Garden Inn in Troy. Each student will be recognized and awards will be presented. Contact Debbie Roden, rodend3@rpi.edu, for dinner choices and cost. RSVP is required
item.author: Students

item.title: Updated Commencement Important Dates and Details
item.description: On Friday, May 8th important dates and items were sent out to all registered graduates attending commencement. Keep an eye out for all communications as graduation day approaches!
item.author: Students

item.title: Ph.D. Hooding Ceremony
item.description: Date: Friday, May 15, 2026 8:30 AM - 11:00 AM - The Ph.D. Hooding ceremony is a unique recognition of the achievement of each student who has earned a doctorate. Each doctoral candidate is introduced individually during the ceremony. They will have their hood placed on them while standing on the stage in the concert hall. Check-in starts- at 7:45 AM Ceremony- at 8:30 AM Refreshments- after the ceremony concludes.
item.author: Community

item.title: BME Commencement Luncheon
item.description: Date: Friday, May 15, 2026 12:00 PM - 2:00 PM - Please join the BME department faculty and staff was we celebrate the 2026 graduates! Families welcome.
item.author: Community

item.title: Removal of Unused Webex Recordings
item.description: With the close of the spring semester, all members of the RPI community are asked to review any recordings stored in Webex and delete those which are no longer needed. Everyone has a quota allotted for storage in Webex, and exceeding that quota may result in being unable to record to the cloud. Please submit a support request with any questions; Multimedia Services would be happy to assist: https://itssc.rpi.edu/hc/en-us/requests/new?ticket_form_id=12539963570701
item.author: Community

item.title: Planning Ahead: iClicker Support Concludes January 2027
item.description:
iClicker will no longer be a supported campus tool as of January 2027 starting in the spring term. For those that may still be using iClicker, we recommend using Slido which is currently the supported polling tool on campus.

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Community
